[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000101110 4
5 0100111000 4
6 0000100000 1
7 0000101110 4

01 10 0001100000 2
12 21 0010101010 4
23 32 0010110000 3
34 43 0000110000 2
45 54 0000000010 1
56 65 0000000010 1
67 76 0100101100 4
70 07 0100100000 2

02 20 0100100001 3
13 31 1010100000 3
24 42 0000111011 5
35 53 0010000000 1
46 64 0000101110 4 match 4 7
57 75 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3
60 06 0100100000 2
71 17 0000101100 3

03 30 0000100000 1 match 6
14 41 0000101110 4 match 4 7
25 52 0010000010 2
36 63 0000100000 1 match 6
47 74 0000111100 4
50 05 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3
61 16 0000101110 4 match 4 7
72 27 0100111000 4 match 5

04 40 0000100001 2
15 51 0010000010 2
26 62 0100101010 4
37 73 0000110000 2
[completion]
